transcript: Customer: This is an emergency, my furnace froze up with ice on the lines and it's getting bad! This is Robert Klein at 7 River Road. Dispatcher: Okay Robert, stay calm. I'm getting a technician dispatched to 7 River Road right now. Customer: Please hurry. Dispatcher: A tech is on the way, they'll call you when they're close.

expected_entities.issue: emergency: furnace froze up with ice on the lines
